reasoning: The control 'Identifier Management | Identify User Status' is focused on managing user identifiers and ensuring that access is appropriately controlled. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that RBAC is properly configured to prevent unauthorized or overly privileged access. Specifically, ensuring that anonymous access is disabled, service accounts do not automatically mount tokens unless necessary, and role bindings enforce least privilege are relevant checks.
title: Identifier Management | Identify User Status
